repo.description: [AAAI 2024] CTX-txt2vec, the acoustic model in UniCATS

terms.context_snippet: > This is the official implementation of **CTX-txt2vec** TTS model in the AAAI-2024 paper [UniCATS: A Unified Context-Aware Text-to-Speech Framework with Contextual VQ-Diffusion and Vocoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.07547).

> This is the official implementation of **CTX-txt2vec** TTS model in the AAAI-2024 paper [UniCATS: A Unified Context-Aware Text-to-Speech Framework with Contextual VQ-Diffusion and Vocoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.07547).
